## Palantir valuation premium questioned following AI deal activity

Persistent valuation scrutiny on PLTR reflects the core portfolio risk: the premium multiple is only defensible if AI deal flow converts to durable revenue at scale — this headline provides no new data to resolve that question, but it keeps the risk visible and underscores the need to track deal-to-revenue conversion closely.

- Coverage raises whether PLTR's current valuation premium is justified in light of recent AI deal flow.
- The headline is explicitly a valuation-scrutiny piece, not a new deal announcement or earnings update.
- No deal values, revenue figures, customer names, or valuation multiples appear in the headline.
- Source is a single editorial outlet (simplywall.st) at medium confidence.
- The story reinforces the ongoing premium-vs-fundamentals debate that has surrounded PLTR throughout its AI re-rating.
